edge.label: Edge public entry
edge.hint: The first reachable node for users, usually with a public endpoint and used as the first hop.

relay.label: Relay private downstream
relay.hint: A user LAN, VPN-side, or transit node that usually sits behind an edge node.

bootstrap.scopeKeyHint: Use the same scope for nodes that belong to the same reachable group.
bootstrap.parentNodeIdHint: Relay nodes usually choose their edge parent. Edge nodes usually leave this empty.
bootstrap.parentNodeAutoHint: Relay nodes auto-select an existing edge node when one is available.
bootstrap.parentReachableUrlRequired: Selected upstream node has no reachable endpoint to auto match
bootstrap.parentReachableUrlHint: Address that the child node can use to reach its upstream parent.
bootstrap.publicHostHint: Recommended for edge nodes. Usually empty for relay or user-LAN nodes.
bootstrap.publicPortHint: Leave empty to use the node listener default. Only public entries usually need this.
bootstrap.publicEndpointAutoHint: The edge node reports its public IP during enrollment; this port is used to build the public endpoint.
bootstrap.publicPortInvalid: Port must be a positive integer
bootstrap.targetNodeIdHint: Leave blank for a new node. Fill only when binding to a manual record.
bootstrap.nodeImageTagsHint: Official release tags are loaded from Git tags. The latest tag is selected by default.
bootstrap.nodeImageTagsFallback: Using the panel build tag because release tags could not be loaded.
bootstrap.tokenShownOnce: Token is shown once in this page state. Generate a new one if the machine was not enrolled.
bootstrap.dockerScopeHint: Node name, type, scope, upstream and public endpoint metadata are stored in the bootstrap token. The target machine only needs the control-plane URL and token.
bootstrap.generateOnDemand: Generate on demand. Token content is only kept in current page state.
bootstrap.nodeNameDuplicate: A node with this name already exists
bootstrap.bootstrapHint: Remote node self-enroll flow for machines not directly reachable from the panel.
